heading: National Flood Insurance Fund
label: 4017 National Flood Insurance Fund
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b)(6), was in the original a reference to “this title” meaning title XIII of , , , known as the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 90–44882 Stat. 572section 4001 of this titleAug. 1, 1968

children.text: for making such payments as may, from time to time, be required under ;section 4054 of this title
to pay reinsurance claims under the excess loss reinsurance coverage provided under ;section 4055 of this title
to repay to the Secretary of the Treasury such sums as may be borrowed from him (together with interest) in accordance with the authority provided in ; andsection 4016 of this title

to the extent approved in appropriations Acts, to pay any administrative expenses of the flood insurance and floodplain management programs (including the costs of mapping activities under );section 4101 of this title
for the purposes specified in subsection (d) under the conditions provided therein;
for carrying out the program under ;section 4022(b) of this title
for transfers to the National Flood Mitigation Fund, but only to the extent provided in ; andsection 4104d(b)(1) of this title
for carrying out .section 4104(f) of this title
such funds borrowed in accordance with the authority provided in as may from time to time be deposited in the fund;section 4016 of this title
premiums, fees, or other charges which may be paid or collected in connection with the excess loss reinsurance coverage provided under ;section 4055 of this title
such amounts as may be advanced to the fund from appropriations in order to maintain the fund in an operative condition adequate to meet its liabilities;
interest which may be earned on investments of the fund pursuant to subsection (c);
such sums as are required to be paid to the Administrator under ; andsection 4015(d) of this title
receipts from any other operations under this chapter (including premiums under the conditions specified in subsection (d), and salvage proceeds, if any, resulting from reinsurance coverage).

children.heading: Investment of moneys in obligations issued or guaranteed by United States
children.label: c Investment of moneys in obligations issued or guaranteed by United States

children.text: all outstanding obligations of the fund have been liquidated, and

any outstanding amounts which may have been advanced to the fund from appropriations authorized under have been credited to the appropriation from which advanced, with interest accrued at the rate prescribed under , as in effect immediately prior to ,section 4127(a)(2)(B) of this titlesection 2414(e) of this titleAugust 1, 1968

children.heading: Availability of Fund if operation of program is carried out through facilities of Federal Government
children.label: d Availability of Fund if operation of program is carried out through facilities of Federal Government

children.text: cost incurred in the adjustment and payment of any claims for losses, and
payment of applicable operating costs set forth in the schedules prescribed under ,section 4018 of this title

children.heading: Annual budget
children.label: e Annual budget
children.text: An annual business-type budget for the fund shall be prepared, transmitted to the Congress, considered, and enacted in the manner prescribed by sections 9103 and 9104 of title 31 for wholly-owned Government corporations.

children.heading: Availability of funds dependent on future appropriations acts
children.label: f Availability of funds dependent on future appropriations acts
children.text: The fund shall be available, with respect to any fiscal year beginning on or after , only to the extent approved in appropriation Acts; except that the fund shall be available for the purpose described in subsection (d)(1) without such approval.October 1, 1981
